wikitext:
{{#setmainimage:Enchant_Glam.png|quiet}} __notoc__ '''Enchantments''' are a new {{2|Mechanics|Mechanic}} introduced in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. They are permanent, positive effects added to cards either in your Deck or in card rewards through various {{2|Events}}, {{2|Ancients}}, and {{2|Relics}}. A card can only have one enchantment. {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Icon ! style="width: 7em;" | Name ! Source ! Source type ! Target Card ! Description ! Notes |-
| [[File:Enchant_Adroit.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Adroit | {{R|Kifuda||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} | 3 cards | Gain X {{KW|Block||2}}. | * For {{R|Kifuda||2}}, X is 3 even though {{R|Kifuda|Kifuda's|2}} description does not specify an X value for '''Adroit'''. * '''Adroit''' is affected by {{KW|Dexterity||2}} and {{KW|Frail||2}}. |-
| [[File:Enchant_Clone.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Clone | {{R|Pael's Growth||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Pael||2}} | 1 card | This card can be duplicated at Rest Sites. | * Duplicates created by '''Cloning''' will also have the '''Clone''' {{KW|Enchant|Enchantment|2}}. Each time '''Clone''' is selected at a {{2|Rest Sites|Rest Site}}, the number of '''Cloned''' cards will double (or triple with {{R|Bing Bong||2}}). |-
| [[File:Enchant_Corrupted.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Corrupted | {{E|Symbiote|2}} | Event: {{2|Hive}}, {{2|Glory}} | 1 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} | Deal 50% more damage, but lose 2 HP. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_Favored.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Favored | | | | This card's attack damage is doubled. | * Not obtainable. |-
| rowspan="2" | [[File:Enchant_Glam.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | rowspan="2" style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Glam | {{R|Glitter||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Nonupeipe||2}} | All Future Card Rewards | rowspan="2" | This card has {{KW|Replay||2}} once per combat. | rowspan="2" | * {{R|Silken Tress||2}} is currently only available in [[Slay the Spire 2:Patch_Notes#Beta Patches|BETA branch of the game]] |- | {{R|Silken Tress||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Neow||2}} | First Card Reward |-
| [[File:Enchant_Goopy.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Goopy | {{R|Pael's Claw||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Pael||2}} | All {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defends|2}} | This card gains {{KW|Exhaust||2}}. When played, permanently increase this card's {{KW|Block||2}} by 1. | * Any copies of {{C|Ultimate Defend||2}} in your Deck will also be {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} with '''Goopy'''. |-
| [[File:Enchant_Imbued.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Imbued | {{R|Electric Shrymp||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Orobas||2}} | 1 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} | This card is played automatically at the start of each combat. | * The card is played for free, meaning it doesn't cost any {{KW|Energy||2}} or {{KW|Stars||2}}. |-
| [[File:Enchant_Inky.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Inky | {{C|Blade of Ink||2}} | {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Card|2}} | {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} | This card deals 2 additional damage and applies 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_Instinct.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Instinct | {{R|Tri-Boomerang||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Tanx||2}} | 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} | This card's attack damage is doubled. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_Momentum.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Momentum | {{R|Punch Dagger||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} | 1 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} | Increase this card's attack damage by X this combat when played. | |-
| rowspan="2" | [[File:Enchant_Nimble.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | rowspan="2" style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Nimble | {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} | Event: All Acts | 1 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}}: '''Nimble''' 2 | rowspan="2" | Increases {{KW|Block||2}} gained from this card by X. | rowspan="2" | * {{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} can only be obtained from {{E|Drowning Beacon|2}}. |- | {{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} | Event: {{2|Underdocks}} | Any card you add to your Deck that gains {{KW|Block||2}}: '''Nimble''' 2 |-
| [[File:Enchant_PerfectFit.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Perfect Fit | {{E|Field of Man-Sized Holes|2}} | Event: {{2|Hive}} | 1 card | Whenever this would be shuffled into your Draw Pile, place it on the top instead. | * The effect does not apply when your Draw Pile is shuffed at the start of each combat; in other words, cards enchanted with '''Perfect Fit''' are ''not'' effectively {{KW|Innate||2}}. |-
| [[File:Enchant_RoyallyApproved.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Royally Approved | {{R|Royal Stamp||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} | an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} or {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} | This card has {{KW|Innate||2}} and {{KW|Retain||2}}. | |-
| rowspan="2" | [[File:Enchant_Sharp.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | rowspan="2" style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Sharp | {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} | Event: All Acts | {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}: '''Sharp''' 2 | rowspan="2" | Increases damage on this card by X. | rowspan="2" | |- | {{R|Gnarled Hammer||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} | up to 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}: '''Sharp''' 3 |-
| rowspan="3" | [[File:Enchant_Swift.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | rowspan="3" style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Swift | {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} | Event: All Acts | {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power|2}}: '''Swift 2''' | rowspan="3" | The first time you play this card, draw X cards. | rowspan="3" | |- | {{R|Wing Charm||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} | a random card in each card reward: '''Swift 1''' |- | {{R|Beautiful Bracelet||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Nonupeipe||2}} | 3 cards: '''Swift 3''' |-
| [[File:Enchant_Slither.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Slither | {{E|Wood Carvings|2}} | Event: {{2|Overgrowth}} | 1 card | When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_SlumberingEssence.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Slumbering Essence | | | | If this card is in your hand at the end of the turn, reduce its cost by 1 until it is played. | * Not obtainable. |-
| [[File:Enchant_SoulsPower.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Soul's Power | {{E|Grave of the Forgotten|2}} | Event: {{2|Glory}} | A card that {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}} | This card loses {{KW|Exhaust||2}}. | * Choosing the {{Frame|Confront with Truth}} option also adds {{C|Decay||2}} to your Deck. |-
| [[File:Enchant_Sown.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Sown | {{E|Sapphire Seed|2}} | Event: {{2|Overgrowth}} | 1 card | The first time you play this card each combat, gain {{KW|Energy||2}}. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_Spiral.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Spiral | {{E|Spiraling Whirlpool|2}} | Event: {{2|Underdocks}} | a {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike|2}} or {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defend|2}} | This card gains {{KW|Replay||2}} 1. | |-
| [[File:Enchant_Steady.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Steady | {{E|Waterlogged Scriptorium|2}} | Event: {{2|Underdocks}} | 1 card / 2 cards | This card gains {{KW|Retain||2}}. | * {{E|Waterlogged Scriptorium|2}} allows you to {{KW|Enchant||2}} 1 card with '''Steady''' for 65 Gold, or 2 cards for 155 Gold upon choosing the {{Frame|Tentacle Quill}} or {{Frame|Prickly Sponge}} option respectively. |-
| [[File:Enchant_TezcatarasEmber.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Tezcatara's Ember | {{R|Nutritious Soup||2}} | {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient Relic|2}}: {{KW|Tezcatara||2}} | all {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strikes|2}} in your Deck | Costs 0 and gains {{KW|Eternal||2}}. | * Any {{C|Ultimate Strike|Ultimate Strikes|2}} in your Deck will ''not'' be {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}. |-
| [[File:Enchant_Vigorous.png|frameless|60x60px|center]] | style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" | Vigorous | {{E|Stone of All Time|2}} | Event: {{2|Hive}} | 1 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} | The first time this card is played, it deals X additional damage. | * {{E|Stone of All Time|2}} allows you to {{KW|Enchant||2}} an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} with '''Vigorous 8''' at the cost of 6 HP upon choosing the {{Frame|Push}} option. |} == Update History == * '''Early Access v.0.105.0 (BETA)''' ** Added {{R|Silken Tress||2}}, a {{KW|Neow||2}} Relic which enchants all cards in the first card reward with Glam. * '''Early Access v0.103.2''' ** Instinct changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game. * '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)''' ** Instinct enchantment no longer reduces cost, instead doubles damage on enchanted Attacks.
